_comment: Fas 4b PR-6 (ADR 0093 D4). Proper-noun / technical-term allowlist for the C7 spelling criterion: legitimate lowercase-initial loanwords a Swedish CV uses that the sv_SE DSSO dictionary lacks, so C7 never reports them as misspellings. NOT the dictionary itself (editing sv_SE.dic is forbidden: SHA-pinned + LGPL unmodified). Whole-token, NFC-folded, case-insensitive match. Extend additively; a term change is an allowlist version bump. Capitalized proper nouns (company/person/place names) are skipped by the tokenizer and need no entry.
